description_long: This house features a striking geometric roof design with bold black and white patterns, complemented by a prominent red gabled section. The structure is rectangular with a mix of flat and pitched roof elements, and the exterior walls are primarily light-colored with dark accents. The house sits on a large, gridded base that suggests a landscaped or paved area around it. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped in horizontal bands and others more isolated. The main entryway is marked by a small overhang and steps, providing a subtle but clear point of access. The overall appearance is modern with a touch of eclecticism, making it stand out in an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern house with a bold, patterned roof, red gabled section, and light-colored walls accented by dark trim. Asymmetrical windows and a distinct entryway add to its unique urban character.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red gabled roof section and patterned flat roof, with light walls and a small entry overhang visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, steps, and the full geometric roof pattern, with windows visible on the facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the house, the red roof extension, and fewer visible windows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back facade, more of the patterned roof, and a secondary entry or exit point.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with small overhang, steps, and minimal decorative elements
